current_install_surface: The supported install path today is the packaged GitHub Release zip.
bundle_claim: A Prompt Switchboard public bundle means repo-owned config, skill or prompt guidance, placement hints, smoke flow, and synced public docs.

opencode.summary: OpenCode documents Agent Skills as SKILL.md definitions and explicitly calls out frontmatter name and description.

codex.summary: Official Codex MCP docs were verified, but no separate Prompt Switchboard skill registry or marketplace manifest surface was verified from those docs.

claude_code.summary: Official Claude Code MCP docs were verified, but no separate skill registry or marketplace manifest surface was verified from those docs.

openclaw.summary: OpenClaw official docs verify plugin bundle and saved MCP server definition flows, but no separate Prompt Switchboard skill marketplace schema was verified.

docker_glama_surface.purpose: Containerized local Prompt Switchboard MCP sidecar and operator helper for builder-facing flows.
docker_glama_surface.bridge_requirement: When the container hosts the live sidecar, publish loopback port 48123 on the host and set PROMPT_SWITCHBOARD_BRIDGE_HOST=0.0.0.0 inside the container so the host browser can still reach 127.0.0.1:48123.

glama_surface.summary: Current accessible Glama pages verify a public MCP server catalog and a connector surface that says connectors browse the official MCP Registry and connect without local installation. No official Prompt Switchboard listing or Docker-specific submission requirement was verified from those pages in this run.

missing: an owner-controlled Prompt Switchboard listing or connector entry
verify_after: claim alignment with README and public distribution docs

official_registry_surface.summary: The official MCP Registry already returns a live Prompt Switchboard MCP entry for the same local sidecar install surface.

missing: optional namespace/auth work only if a package-backed upgrade is desired
steps: Keep the already-live registry entry aligned with the browser-first README, landing page, and local sidecar docs.
Only plan extra registry work if you want a package-backed install upgrade beyond the current websiteUrl-backed entry.
If that upgrade matters, publish the package artifact first, then complete the exact auth and namespace steps for that richer install surface.
Verify the live registry URL, listed version, and install surface before changing any broader marketplace claims.

codex.label: Codex

official_public_surface.summary: Official Codex MCP setup docs are verified. No official Prompt Switchboard marketplace or registry listing surface was verified from current official Codex docs.

codex.placement_hint: Paste the MCP block into the Codex MCP server section inside config.toml.
codex.truthful_claim: Prompt Switchboard ships a public Codex starter bundle, but not an official Codex marketplace listing.

claude_code.label: Claude Code

official_public_surface.summary: Official Claude Code MCP setup docs are verified. No official Prompt Switchboard marketplace or registry listing surface was verified from current official Claude Code MCP docs.

claude_code.placement_hint: Paste the MCP block into a Claude Code MCP config file such as .mcp.json.
claude_code.truthful_claim: Prompt Switchboard ships a public Claude Code starter bundle, but not an official Claude Code marketplace listing.

opencode.label: OpenCode

official_public_surface.summary: Official OpenCode docs expose a plugin system and public plugin distribution shape, but this repo does not yet ship a published OpenCode plugin package.

opencode.placement_hint: Save the example as a project-root opencode.jsonc inside your Prompt Switchboard clone.
opencode.truthful_claim: Prompt Switchboard ships a public-bundle-ready OpenCode plugin packet, but not a published OpenCode plugin package yet.

missing: published OpenCode plugin package under an owner-controlled namespace
steps: Run npm run release:host-kits and verify the OpenCode packet archive under dist/public-bundles/.
Choose the owner-controlled npm package name and namespace for the OpenCode plugin package.
Install it through the official OpenCode plugin flow and verify one compare-first smoke path.

openclaw.label: OpenClaw

official_public_surface.summary: Official OpenClaw docs inspected for this matrix expose MCP registry setup through openclaw mcp set, plugin install docs, and bundle install docs, but they do not prove a published Prompt Switchboard listing.

openclaw.placement_hint: Register the JSON with openclaw mcp set or place the server definition under mcp.servers.
openclaw.truthful_claim: Prompt Switchboard ships a public-bundle-ready OpenClaw packet through bundle artifacts and MCP registry snippets, but no published Prompt Switchboard OpenClaw listing is verified from the official docs checked in this run.

missing: published OpenClaw plugin or bundle listing under an owner-controlled surface
steps: Run npm run release:host-kits and verify the OpenClaw packet archive under dist/public-bundles/.
Choose the official OpenClaw public surface you will really use: bundle install, plugin listing, or another official listing surface backed by OpenClaw docs.
Publish the repo-owned OpenClaw packet and keep the MCP registry JSON, shell helper, and install docs aligned to that exact surface.
Verify the listing URL or bundle URL and one compare-first smoke path after publish.
